017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.sse;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
022
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.*;
025import java.util.concurrent.atomic.*;
026import java.util.function.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse.*;
029
030/**
031 * Subscriber queue for an {@link SseBroadcaster}.
032 */
033public class SseSubscription implements AutoCloseable, Iterable<SseEvent> {
034
035   private final String id;
036   private final LinkedBlockingDeque<SseEvent> queue;
037   private final AtomicBoolean closed;
038   private final Consumer<String> closeCallback;
039
040   SseSubscription(String id, int queueSize, Consumer<String> closeCallback) {
041      if (isEmpty(id))
042         throw iaex("id cannot be null or empty.");
043      this.id = id;
044      this.queue = new LinkedBlockingDeque<>(queueSize);
045      this.closeCallback = assertArgNotNull("closeCallback", closeCallback);
046      closed = new AtomicBoolean(false);
047   }
048
049   /**
050    * The subscriber identifier.
051    *
052    * @return The subscriber identifier.
053    */
054   public String getId() {
055      return id;
056   }
057
058   /**
059    * Returns whether this subscription has been closed.
060    *
061    * @return {@code true} if this subscription has been closed.
062    */
063   public boolean isClosed() {
064      return closed.get();
065   }
066
067   boolean offer(SseEvent event) {
068      if (isClosed())
069         return false;
070      var dropped = false;
071      while (! queue.offerLast(event)) {
072         queue.pollFirst();
073         dropped = true;
074      }
075      return dropped;
076   }
077
078   /**
079    * Blocks until the next event is available.
080    *
081    * @return The next event.
082    * @throws InterruptedException If the wait was interrupted.
083    */
084   public SseEvent take() throws InterruptedException {
085      return queue.takeFirst();
086   }
087
088   @Override /* Iterable */
089   public Iterator<SseEvent> iterator() {
090      return new Iterator<>() {
091         @Override
092         public boolean hasNext() {
093            return ! isClosed();
094         }
095
096         @Override
097         public SseEvent next() {
098            try {
099               return take();
100            } catch (InterruptedException e) {
101               Thread.currentThread().interrupt();
102               throw new NoSuchElementException("Interrupted while waiting for SSE event.");
103            }
104         }
105      };
106   }
107
108   @Override /* AutoCloseable */
109   public void close() {
110      if (closed.compareAndSet(false, true)) {
111         queue.clear();
112         closeCallback.accept(id);
113      }
114   }
115}
